title: Hide stopped containers in `podman stats`
body:
### Feature request description

`podman stats` shows all containers, including stopped.

Most of the time I'm not interested in stats of stopped containers.


### Suggest potential solution

I'd like to have an option to hide stopped containers.

IMO we should hide stopped containers by default.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out, @jonashaag !

@boaz0 is working on a fix in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/19254.
